nasb.text: They shall not make any baldness on their heads, nor shave off the edges of their beards, nor make any cuts in their flesh.

esv.text: They shall not make bald patches on their heads, nor shave off the edges of their beards, nor make any cuts on their body.

cnv.text: 祭司不可剃光頭髮，鬍鬚的周圍不可剃掉，也不可紋身。

ccb.text: 祭司不可剃光头、修剪胡须或割伤身体。
